plssem 0.1.3
  • Reference
  • Articles
    • Categorical Models with plssem
    • Higher Order Models
    • Interaction Models with plssem
    • Linear Models with plssem
    • Monte-Carlo Consistent Partial Least Squares
    • Handling Missing Values with plssem
    • Multilevel Models with plssem
    • Ordinal Regression with plssem
    • Parallel Bootstrapping with plssem
    • Unstandardized Estimates

Retrieve bootstrap coefficient matrix

Source: R/model_generics.R
pls_boot.Rd

Retrieve bootstrap coefficient matrix

pls_boot(object)

Arguments

object

A fitted model object.

Value

A PlsSemMatrix of bootstrap replicate parameter vectors (rows = replicates, cols = parameters).

Examples

library(modsem)
library(plssem)

m <- "
  X =~ x1 + x2 + x3
  Z =~ z1 + z2 + z3
  Y =~ y1 + y2 + y3
  Y ~ X + Z + X:Z
"

fit <- pls(m, oneInt, bootstrap = TRUE, boot.R = 50)
pls_boot(fit)
#>     X=~x1  X=~x2  X=~x3  Z=~z1  Z=~z2  Z=~z3  Y=~y1  Y=~y2  Y=~y3    Y~X    Y~Z
#> 1   0.941  0.914  0.878  0.917  0.882  0.912  0.968  0.938  0.965  0.410  0.315
#> 2   0.933  0.906  0.898  0.923  0.919  0.901  0.961  0.967  0.956  0.405  0.383
#> 3   0.921  0.910  0.895  0.896  0.919  0.921  0.976  0.944  0.961  0.419  0.359
#> 4   0.922  0.917  0.887  0.925  0.904  0.915  0.961  0.957  0.963  0.434  0.348
#> 5   0.932  0.920  0.886  0.907  0.918  0.904  0.962  0.959  0.956  0.397  0.374
#> 6   0.953  0.914  0.870  0.876  0.918  0.935  0.975  0.955  0.960  0.447  0.346
#> 7   0.885  0.939  0.900  0.904  0.924  0.907  0.965  0.964  0.961  0.412  0.390
#> 8   0.909  0.904  0.910  0.933  0.900  0.901  0.966  0.954  0.971  0.409  0.382
#> 9   0.931  0.902  0.904  0.928  0.905  0.910  0.981  0.947  0.953  0.415  0.358
#> 10  0.923  0.909  0.907  0.931  0.892  0.934  0.960  0.978  0.949  0.401  0.360
#> 11  0.929  0.897  0.898  0.917  0.901  0.918  0.966  0.949  0.966  0.428  0.384
#> 12  0.947  0.894  0.893  0.915  0.901  0.917  0.961  0.969  0.961  0.438  0.356
#> 13  0.932  0.927  0.859  0.909  0.900  0.915  0.964  0.963  0.952  0.427  0.351
#> 14  0.927  0.874  0.925  0.891  0.924  0.929  0.978  0.946  0.961  0.434  0.345
#> 15  0.934  0.898  0.907  0.916  0.924  0.889  0.971  0.960  0.958  0.419  0.391
#> 16  0.908  0.909  0.923  0.932  0.918  0.887  0.971  0.953  0.964  0.415  0.366
#> 17  0.906  0.913  0.925  0.909  0.887  0.937  0.975  0.948  0.962  0.454  0.325
#> 18  0.911  0.938  0.898  0.918  0.888  0.940  0.965  0.949  0.970  0.402  0.369
